headline: McKesson Stock Is Shrinking, and That's The Point for Owners
summary: While the market debates growth, this healthcare giant is steadily retiring its own shares, a strategy that has quietly compounded value for investors.

raw.headline: McKesson Stock Is Shrinking, and That's The Point for Owners
raw.summary: While the market debates growth, this healthcare giant is steadily retiring its own shares, a strategy that has quietly compounded value for investors.

headline: Cardinal Health to Announce Fourth-Quarter and Year-End Results for Fiscal Year 2026 on August 11
summary: Cardinal Health (NYSE: CAH) plans to release fourth-quarter and year-end financial results for its fiscal year 2026 on August 11, prior to the opening of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The company will webcast a discussion of these results beginning at 8:30 a.m. Eastern.
